title: Weberbauera stenophylla

The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits such as antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Bioactive constituents of Weberbauera stenophylla include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Weberbauera stenophylla is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
